task: Complete EvoClaw web terminal (clawinfra/evoclaw repo). web/terminal.html exists with a basic marked.js chat UI and api/terminal.go serves it. Upgrade to a proper xterm.js-based terminal: (1) replace terminal.html with xterm.js + FitAddon + WebLinksAddon for real terminal emulation, (2) add WebSocket endpoint GET /api/terminal/ws in api/terminal.go that pipes stdin/stdout to the TUI or chat agent session, (3) add auth (JWT Bearer token same as /api/chat), (4) show agent selector dropdown to target different agents, (5) support markdown rendering for agent replies (marked.js already present), (6) expose at /terminal route in server.go. Dark theme matching EvoClaw branding (#1e1e1e background). Add Go tests for the new WS handler. Branch feat/web-terminal, PR. gh CLI as AlexChen31337.
